name: Mimosa Ice Cream Crepes with Buttered Honey
recipeInstructions:
1. To crisp the crepes: Preheat the oven to 375°F. Arrange as many crepes in a single layer on a cooling rack, ensuring they are spaced apart for air circulation. Place the rack over a cookie sheet and bake for about 2 minutes or until the edges are crispy while the center remains foldable. Remove from the oven, cool folded, and repeat until you have one crepe per serving.
2. To make the ice cream: Remove mimosa blossoms from stems and leaves; use about 1 cup. In a non-reactive saucepan, combine blossoms with milk, whipping cream, and sugar. Heat to just under boiling (190-200°F) for approximately 30 minutes, keeping the temperature consistent.
3. Whisk egg yolks in a small bowl and gradually add hot mixture while stirring constantly until it coats a spoon. Strain into a bowl, pressing blossoms to extract flavor; chill thoroughly.
4. Freeze according to ice cream maker instructions.
5. Serve in crisp crepes, garnishing with mimosa blossoms and drizzling buttered honey over the top.
